Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hats [300046106], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Men's hard, round-crowned, felt hats with a narrow brim, slightly rolled in.
Sombrero masculino fuerte, de fieltro, de coronilla redondeada, con un ala estrecha, ligeramente enrollada hacia dentro.
Harde, vilten herenhoeden met ronde bol en een smalle rand die lichtelijk naar binnen is gerold.
圓頂，毛氈製的男用硬帽，帽緣狹窄，微微往內捲。
Filzhut für Männer mit steifem, runden Kopfteil und einer schmalen Krempe, die leicht aufgebogen ist.
